prose: Fukui reactivity indices computed for furan (9 atoms: O, C, C, C, C, H, H, H, H) using DFT at tier 'standard' = B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF RKS), exact four-centre integrals (no density fitting), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Cation: charge +1, multiplicity 2; anion: charge −1, multiplicity 2. Partial charges via Mulliken scheme (PySCF). Geometry: user-supplied .xyz, not re-optimized at DFT. All three SCF runs converged; integrity.status = ok; trustworthy = true. Charge conservation checks passed: sum(f+) = 1.0000, sum(f−) = 1.0000. No warnings were raised. Headline value reported: most electrophilic f+ = 1.9242931 at atom 5 (C, α-carbon), consistent with furan's known reactivity at the 2- and 5-positions. The warnings array returned by the tool was empty — clean run.
